name: UNRWA Mandate 1949 (UN Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East)
summary: The United Nations Relief and Works Agency for Palestine Refugees in the Near East (UNRWA) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UNRWA framework established by the UN General Assembly — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal Palestine-refugees-specific framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal single-population mandate framework (UNRWA established 8 December 1949 by UN General Assembly Resolution 302 IV + UNRWA operations began 1 May 1950 — formal foundational UNRWA framework establishing comprehensive UNRWA organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal Palestine-refugees-specific framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal single-population mandate framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal triennial-renewal-by-UN-General-Assembly framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5-fields-of-operation framework: West Bank + Gaza + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-UNRWA-staff framework via 300+ UNRWA staff killed in Gaza 2023-2025 framework — largest UN agency loss in single conflict in UN history + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 framework via Israeli laws 28 October 2024 banning UNRWA operations in Israel + East Jerusalem + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ICJ-Advisory-Opinion-UNRWA-Israeli-obligations 22 October 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-UNRWA-funding-cuts 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 75-year-anniversary 2025 framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal UNRWA 5 Fields of Operation framework (UNRWA framework providing formal 5 fields of operation framework: West Bank + Gaza Strip + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria framework — formal foundational UNRWA 5 Fields of Operation framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5 Fields of Operation framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 30,000+ UNRWA staff framework primarily Palestine-refugees framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-UNRWA-staff framework (Gaza war 7 October 2023 onwards + 300+ UNRWA staff killed in Gaza 2023-2025 framework — largest UN agency loss in single conflict in UN history + UNRWA Headquarters Gaza struck multiple times 2023-2024 framework — formal foundational UNRWA Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-staff framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 300+ UN agency staff killed in single conflict framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 + ICJ-Advisory-Opinion 2025 framework (Israeli Knesset adopted two UNRWA-Ban Laws 28 October 2024 + UN General Assembly Resolution ES-10/26 of 19 December 2024 requesting ICJ Advisory Opinion + ICJ Advisory Opinion 22 October 2025 on Israeli obligations to UNRWA framework — formal foundational UNRWA-Israeli-Ban-Laws + ICJ-Advisory-Opinion framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal Israeli-Ban-Laws-then-ICJ-Advisory-Opinion framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN-agency-bans-by-host-state framework). The UNRWA Mandate is operating upon 5 fields of operation + 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered + 30,000+ UNRWA staff + ~700+ UNRWA schools + ~140 UNRWA primary health-care facilities — comprehensive Palestine-refugees coverage framework. The Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UNRWA family-services framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal UNRWA Family Social Services + Family Eligibility Registration framework + UNRWA cross-field-family-reunification framework. The UN Secretary-General + UNRWA Commissioner-General + UNRWA Advisory Commission + UNRWA Secretariat are the formal UNRWA bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UNRWA Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: UNRWA Founding Resolution 1949 (UN General Assembly Resolution 302 IV)
statutory_framework.title: UNRWA Founding Resolution
statutory_framework.relevance: UNRWA established 8 December 1949 by UN General Assembly Resolution 302 IV — formal foundational UNRWA framework establishing comprehensive UNRWA organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UNRWA Most-Recent Mandate Renewal 2023 (UN General Assembly Resolution 78/79)
statutory_framework.title: UNRWA Most-Recent Mandate Renewal
statutory_framework.relevance: UNRWA mandate renewed 7 December 2023 by UN General Assembly Resolution 78/79 — formal UNRWA triennial-renewal-2024-2026 framework.

statutory_framework.title: Israeli Knesset UNRWA-Ban Laws
statutory_framework.relevance: Israeli Knesset adopted two UNRWA-Ban Laws 28 October 2024 — formal foundational Israeli-UNRWA-Ban-Laws framework.

statutory_framework.citation: ICJ Advisory Opinion 2025 (UN General Assembly Resolution ES-10/26)
statutory_framework.title: ICJ Advisory Opinion UNRWA
statutory_framework.relevance: UN General Assembly Resolution ES-10/26 of 19 December 2024 requesting ICJ Advisory Opinion + ICJ Advisory Opinion 22 October 2025 on Israeli obligations to UNRWA — formal foundational UNRWA-ICJ-Advisory-Opinion framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Secretary-General
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UNRWA Commissioner-General appointment.

apex_courts.name: UNRWA Commissioner-General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UNRWA — UNRWA Commissioner-General Philippe Lazzarini 2020-2025+ framework.

apex_courts.name: UNRWA Advisory Commission
apex_courts.role: Formal UNRWA Advisory Commission body composed of 28 donor + host states.

anonymisation_convention: UNRWA-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN General Assembly + UNRWA Advisory Commission; individual communications via UNRWA Family Eligibility Registration framework operate formal anonymisation convention.

key_developments.title: 1948 Palestine War + Palestine Refugee crisis
key_developments.description: 1948 Palestine War 30 November 1947 - 20 July 1949 + ~700,000 Palestine refugees displaced — predecessor framework to UNRWA.

key_developments.title: UNRWA established
key_developments.description: UNRWA established 8 December 1949 by UN General Assembly Resolution 302 IV — formal foundational UNRWA framework operational.

key_developments.title: UNRWA operations begin
key_developments.description: UNRWA operations began 1 May 1950 — formal foundational UNRWA operational framework operational.

key_developments.title: 1967 Six-Day War + UNRWA expansion
key_developments.description: 1967 Six-Day War 5-10 June 1967 + UNRWA expansion to West Bank + Gaza Strip + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria 5 fields of operation framework — formal UNRWA 5 fields of operation framework operational.

key_developments.title: 1982 Lebanon War + UNRWA-Lebanon-field-operation framework
key_developments.description: 1982 Lebanon War 6 June - 29 September 1982 + Israeli invasion of Lebanon + Sabra and Shatila massacre 16-18 September 1982 — formal UNRWA-Lebanon-field-operation-mass-casualty-Palestine-refugee framework operational + UNRWA Lebanon field operation disrupted + UNRWA Headquarters Vienna relocated post-1982 framework + formal UN Independent Commission Inquiry framework operational.

key_developments.title: First Trump-administration-US-funding cuts to UNRWA
key_developments.description: First Trump-administration-US-funding cuts to UNRWA September 2018 — formal first Trump-UNRWA-cuts framework operational.

key_developments.title: Biden-administration-restored-US-funding to UNRWA
key_developments.description: Biden-administration restored US funding to UNRWA April 2021 — formal Biden-UNRWA-funding-restored framework operational.

key_developments.title: Gaza war + 300+ UNRWA staff killed
key_developments.description: Israel-Hamas-Gaza war 7 October 2023 onwards + UNRWA staff killed in Gaza 100+ as of December 2023 + 300+ as of 2025 framework — formal UNRWA Gaza-war-staff-killed framework operational.

key_developments.title: Israeli Knesset UNRWA-Ban Laws + 24 donors paused funding
key_developments.description: Israeli Knesset adopted two UNRWA-Ban Laws 28 October 2024 + 24 donor states paused UNRWA funding January-February 2024 over Israeli allegations of UNRWA staff Hamas-affiliation framework + UN OIOS Investigation Final Report April 2024 + Catherine Colonna Independent Review Final Report April 2024 framework — formal UNRWA Israeli-Ban-Laws + funding-paused + UN investigations framework operational.

key_developments.title: ICJ Advisory Opinion + Trump-cuts + 75th anniversary
key_developments.description: ICJ Advisory Opinion 22 October 2025 on Israeli obligations to UNRWA + Trump-administration-UNRWA-funding-cuts 2025 + UNRWA 75th anniversary 2025 framework — formal UNRWA ICJ-Advisory-Opinion + Trump-cuts + 75th-anniversary framework operational.

key_developments.title: Continuing UNRWA framework + triennial-renewal context + Gaza reconstruction
key_developments.description: Continuing UNRWA framework 2026 — continuing UN General Assembly triennial-renewal framework 2026 + continuing Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 framework implementation + continuing Gaza reconstruction framework post-November-2025 ceasefire context + continuing 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered framework + continuing 5 fields of operation (West Bank + Gaza + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria) + 77 years since 1949 UN General Assembly Resolution 302(IV) establishing UNRWA + structurally distinctive globally only modern UN agency operating triennial-renewal framework subject to host-state ban legislation framework.

structural_findings: UNRWA Mandate operates a supranational global framework — places UNRWA Mandate in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal Palestine-refugees-specific framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal single-population mandate framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal Palestine-refugees-specific framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal single-population mandate framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal triennial-renewal-by-UN-General-Assembly framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5-fields-of-operation framework: West Bank + Gaza + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-UNRWA-staff framework via 300+ UNRWA staff killed in Gaza 2023-2025 framework — largest UN agency loss in single conflict in UN history + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ICJ-Advisory-Opinion-UNRWA-Israeli-obligations 22 October 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-UNRWA-funding-cuts 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 75-year-anniversary 2025 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UNRWA 5 Fields of Operation framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5 Fields of Operation framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 30,000+ UNRWA staff framework primarily Palestine-refugees framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-UNRWA-staff framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 300+ UN agency staff killed in single conflict framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 + ICJ-Advisory-Opinion 2025 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal Israeli-Ban-Laws-then-ICJ-Advisory-Opinion framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN-agency-bans-by-host-state framework.

5 fields of operation + 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered + 30,000+ UNRWA staff + 700+ schools + 140 health-care facilities framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive Palestine-refugees coverage framework.

1948 War + 1949 UNRWA + 1950 operations + 1967 Six-Day War + 5 fields + 2018 Trump-cuts + 2021 Biden-restored + 2023 Gaza war + 100+ staff killed + 2024 Israeli Ban Laws + 24 donors paused + investigations + 2025 ICJ Advisory + Trump-cuts + 75th anniversary UNRWA-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UNRWA Mandate + Founding Resolution + 5 Fields of Operation + Family Social Services + Family Eligibility Registration + Israeli Ban Laws + ICJ Advisory Opinion formal septet framework with formal UNRWA Family Social Services + Family Eligibility Registration + cross-field-family-reunification PA-intersection framework is structurally distinctive globally.
editorial_notes: UNRWA Mandate jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global Palestine-refugees-specific foundational-UNRWA meta-framework (UNRWA Founding Resolution 1949 + UNRWA operations 1950 + 5 fields of operation: West Bank + Gaza + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria post-1967 + Most-Recent Mandate Renewal 2023/Res 78/79 + Israeli Knesset UNRWA-Ban Laws 28 October 2024 + UN General Assembly Resolution ES-10/26 of 19 December 2024 requesting ICJ Advisory Opinion + ICJ Advisory Opinion 22 October 2025 + 1948 Palestine War predecessor + 1967 Six-Day War + 2018 first Trump-cuts + 2021 Biden-restored + 2023 Gaza war 300+ UNRWA staff killed + 2024 24 donors paused + UN OIOS + Catherine Colonna Independent Review + 2025 ICJ + Trump-cuts + 75th anniversary). Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal Palestine-refugees-specific framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal single-population mandate framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal triennial-renewal-by-UN-General-Assembly framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5-fields-of-operation framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-UNRWA-staff 300+ killed framework — largest UN agency loss in single conflict + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Israeli-Knesset-UNRWA-Ban-Laws-2024 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ICJ-Advisory-Opinion-22-October-2025 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Trump-administration-UNRWA-funding-cuts 2025 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 75-year-anniversary 2025 + central jurisdiction of formal 5 Fields of Operation: West Bank + Gaza + Jordan + Lebanon + Syria + central jurisdiction of formal Gaza-war-2023-2024 mass-casualty-staff + central jurisdiction of formal Israeli-Ban-Laws-then-ICJ-Advisory-Opinion + 5 fields + 5.9 million Palestine-refugees-registered + 30,000+ UNRWA staff + 700+ schools + 140 health-care facilities + UNRWA Headquartered Gaza City + Amman + UNRWA Commissioner-General Philippe Lazzarini 2020-2025+ + UNRWA Advisory Commission 28 donor + host states + 1948 War + 1949 UNRWA + 1950 operations + 1967 Six-Day War + 5 fields + 2018 Trump-cuts + 2021 Biden-restored + 2023 Gaza war + 100+ staff killed + 2024 Israeli Ban Laws + 24 donors paused + investigations + 2025 ICJ Advisory + Trump-cuts + 75th anniversary UNRWA-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: UNRWA Family Social Services + Family Eligibility Registration + cross-field-family-reunification framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal Palestine-refugees-cross-border-family framework.
